summary: Motivated MERN stack developer with experience in building scalable applications and strong problem-solving skills. Proficient in React, Node.js, and MongoDB, with a keen interest in integrating AI and cloud technologies like AWS.

experience.workdescription: Developed responsive UI components using React and Tailwind CSS, improved page load speed by 30%, and collaborated with backend team for API integration using Node.js and MongoDB.
Built REST APIs using Node.js and Express, integrated MongoDB database, and implemented JWT-based authentication, laying the groundwork for scalable and secure full-stack applications.

projects.description: Developed an AI-powered resume builder that tailors resumes based on job descriptions using LLMs, embeddings, and LangChain, with a MongoDB database and Node.js backend, showcasing expertise in MERN stack and AI integration.
projects.technologies_used: React, Node.js, LangChain, Groq API, MongoDB

projects.description: Created a web app to filter companies based on tags like remote, salary, and tech stack using React, Firebase, and Tailwind CSS, demonstrating proficiency in frontend development and data filtering.

achievements.description: Solved over 500 DSA problems with strong focus on optimization and patterns.
Reached finals in inter-college hackathon among 200+ teams.
